scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: In the competitive e-commerce landscape, Retenzy, founded in 2023, helps Shopify brands maximize Customer Lifetime Value.

scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: The platform drives loyalty using gamified points systems, custom milestones, and structured VIP membership tiers.

scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: To build trust, Retenzy automates review collection via email and SMS, syncing verified reviews with Google Shopping.
scenes.visual: Animated smartphone showing a customer review syncing to a Google search result.

scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: Finally, fifteen pre-built no-code widgets and built-in marketing flows make integration seamless for store owners.
